title: Research Analyst - GERMAN speaking - (m-w-d)
required_skills: 2+ years data analysis / social media manager / agency experience with KPI reporting
Understanding of marketing and social media
Knowledge of and interest in current social media platforms
Technical aptitude for new software and quantitative/qualitative analyses
Experience creating data visualisations and data storytelling
Business writing, client communication and presentation skills
bonus_skills: Familiarity with social media tools such as Brandwatch
matched_skills: 4+ years data analysis experience with KPI reporting (Marketing Manager, Strategy PMO, Working Student roles)
Marketing understanding (Marketing Manager, Product Marketing Manager roles)
Campaign analytics and ROI measurement (proxy for social media paid data knowledge)
Technical aptitude: Power BI PL-300 certified, Qlik Sense, Looker Studio, SAP Analytics
Data storytelling: C-level data storytelling, executive-ready reports, Power BI dashboards
Stakeholder communication and presentation (HSBC Strategy PMO, executive reports)
missing_skills: German fluency (cv shows B1+ only; JD requires fluent German)
Explicit social media paid data experience (Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, TikTok Ads, etc.)
Hands-on knowledge of current social media platforms in professional context
Brandwatch or equivalent social listening tool experience
PowerPoint explicitly listed (Excel yes, PowerPoint not mentioned in tools)
core_responsibilities: Analyse social media and digital data to uncover insights that drive client performance and strategy
Build client-facing presentations that tell compelling, data-driven stories tailored to business objectives
Connect social media trends, audience behavior, and cultural insights to performance data
Work collaboratively and independently on research projects with project management accountability
Provide strategic guidance to clients to map insights to larger business goals
recommended_emphasis: Highlight KPI reporting and data storytelling experience prominently — directly maps to core duties
Reframe campaign analytics work to emphasize social media context wherever possible
Emphasize executive/C-level presentation and client communication skills (HSBC PMO angle)
Mention German language ability but manage expectations — B1+ may be flagged against 'fluent' requirement
Lead with data visualisation tools (Power BI PL-300 certification) to establish technical credibility
Emphasize project management skills (Scrum, SAFe) to show independence and accountability
If any social media tool exposure exists (even personal/academic), add it to address the Brandwatch gap
